title: Sub-Items Timeline
excerpt:
Hi Monday Community. 
Is there a Solution to show the timeline of sub-items in the timeline view? This would be very usefully. 
Thanks for any idea so solve that. 
Harald

posts.author: Elbe-Media (Harald Joerg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Monday Community.

Is there a Solution to show the timeline of sub-items in the timeline view? This would be very usefully.

Thanks for any idea so solve that.

Harald

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Elbe-Media! Good question We are working on this feature and are hoping to release it by the beginning of Q3. For more info on features related to subitems, check out this roadmap!

If you’d like help brainstorming workarounds in the meantime feel free to write back here or to support@monday.com

posts.author: cspowers (Carolyn Powers)
posts.cookedHtml: Definitely would prefer the option to display sub items or not. We are using sub items for internal tasks (not to share with client) and the main items for the information the client needs.

posts.author: carlospi (Carlos Pi)
posts.cookedHtml: Eagerly waiting for this - we use the Timeline a lot and if they don’t show it is as if they didn’t exist…

posts.author: ReubenJ (Reuben)
posts.cookedHtml:
Arghhh…we need this ASAP! The only other timeline tool I can find that does this is Smartsheet!

Please fast track this one - would be awesome to have!

posts.author: bhutch (Bill Hutchinson)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes I agree. This will be a very important feature to move forward with.

posts.author: georg (Georg Ortner)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes this would be very helpful!

posts.author: timos (Timotheos Samartzidis)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree this feature would enable us to use the gantt chart to its full potential!

posts.author: alias_marks (mike brown)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on release of this feature. An earlier message suggested begenning of Q3, and we are now approaching end of Q3

posts.author: Burt2Burt (Bart Brinkman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Was wondering the same. I noticed i can now show the data of the underlying subitems on the main pulse. However. if i were to add two dates, i get a timeline.

What i would like to do is add milestones to bigger projects with this feature. Such that i can see all subitems in the timeline feature as seperate items. I could not find that in the subitem roadmap yet.

posts.author: Midgar777 (Pete Butler)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there any update on this? We’ve recently switched the way we plan our work out, and having the option to include the timeline of a subtask on the main timeline would be amazing.

posts.author: cbacon (Caleb Bacon)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update @TRB-monday.com

posts.author: garrulinae (Jay Craddock)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m also keen for this feature and hoping for an update.

It doesn’t even seem to appear on the roadmap, which is a bit concerning.

posts.author: ampwst (Wesley Teerlink)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes please!
subitems in timeline would be wonderful

posts.author: frickjohnson (L Johnson)
posts.cookedHtml: Any update on this feature? It would be very useful.

posts.author: thho0002 (Thomas Honegger)
posts.cookedHtml: We need this as well! It is even a reason to subscribe or not. When can we expect the release?

posts.author: MaxWoodyWorld (Max)
posts.cookedHtml: +1 Thanks team! Looking forward to use this!

posts.author: sagas (Guilherme)
posts.cookedHtml:
Oh! I asked about this on the support tool, but it’s always good to reinforce how urgent is to have subitems on the boards views and dashboards.

On my case, we are a planning a structure like this:

  • ASSET
    • Step 1 - Person - Date - Estimated hours
    • Step 2 - Person - Date - Estimated hours
    • Step 3 - Person - Date - Estimated hours

The only way we can make this work is to have those views, otherwise we can assign to many tasks/hours for the same person on one given date.

posts.author: alias_marks (mike brown)
posts.cookedHtml: We have the same use case as @cspowers Internal Schedules vs client facing schedules and would love this sub item capability to collect them together under one group

posts.author: anahmani (Ari)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be huge. There’s no point in having sub-tasks if you can’t use them like real tasks/pulses in the Timeline view. It’s as if they don’t exist without this feature for those that rely heavily on the timeline/gantt. Please fix!

posts.author: PhilThompson (Phil Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes agree this would be such a useable feature - we use sub items and record the timeline against these with a resource assigned with a value of time to complete the task. Currently without this showing on the timeline view these entries cannot be used in full.
the only workaround is to view this in a dashboard and select the rolled up summary timeline from each board but of course this does not provide the lower level detail at sub item level.

posts.author: justbuc (Justina Bučinskaitė)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there!

I just wanted to add to this thread, that having the timeline/Gantt for the subitems category would be such a great feature!
We want to try campaign management with personal tasks together on one board. To see the subtasks in timeline would give the better view on who’s working on what and when.

Thanks guys!

posts.author: AMA (Angelo Martilotti)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

We also need this feature. We are in the middle of building our working structure and need the feature urgently.

You gave a time estimation of beginning of Q3. Now my question is when the feature is ready?

Thank you for your feedback.

posts.author: everclear76 (Andrew Clare)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Monday Team, can you give an update on when this is added?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @everclear76 and @AMA, thanks for following up!

We are currently having users test subitems in the timeline widget (not the view) in the dashboard in alpha. We had some setbacks when we initially tested it, so this is round 2

If you’d like to test out the subitems in the timeline widget, please feel free to reach out to support@monday.com so we can grant you the alpha feature to test!

@justbuc, @PhilThompson, @anahmani, @alias_marks, @sagas, @MaxWoodyWorld, @thho0002, @frickjohnson

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: And @ampwst, @garrulinae, @cbacon, @Midgar777, @Burt2Burt, @timos, @georg, @bhutch, @ReubenJ, @carlospi, want to make sure you all see this as well!!

posts.author: Burt2Burt (Bart Brinkman)
posts.cookedHtml: thanks, but i will wait for the beta!

posts.author: sagas (Guilherme)
posts.cookedHtml:
TRB-monday.com:

support@monday.com

Thanks! E-mail sent.

posts.author: PhilThompson (Phil Thompson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @TRB-monday.com
It would be a great feature to also have this available at the workload view within a board to pick up sub items, exactly for the reasons mentioned above.

posts.author: RobGonzalez (Rob González)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi! tried to make the subtask display on the widget but couldn’t make it happen, any documentations or tip to do this?

Thank you

posts.author: Fil (Filip Kemp)
posts.cookedHtml: Its now 2021 and I am requiring this function to be implemented otherwise I will need to use another piece of software. Is there any news?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @PhilThompson, can definitely understand it would be useful in the workload view! While it’s not available in that view yet, it is available in the workload widget on a dashboard. Would that be helpful?

Hey @RobGonzalez, thanks for posting I would recommend writing to us at support@monday.com and letting us know which specific widget you’d like to use subitems on. We’d be happy to troubleshoot with you there.

Thanks @Fil for posting! Subitems should be showing up in the timeline widget for everyone, so if it’s not for you please write in to support@monday.com and we’ll troubleshoot with you/make sure you get it set up

posts.author: Fil (Filip Kemp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi thanks for the reply. I might have my terminology wrong but I would like to see the subitem dependencies and times in the Gantt view?

Cheers,

Fil

posts.author: Loonie (Arnout van Loon)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi there, Gantt view on sub items is currently available in the Gantt view widget in the dashboard. Sort of work around (you need to create a dashboard) but at least for now it is there. For me also it needs to be available in the standard Gantt view and able to put the view on subitems on and off.

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @Fil, thanks for posting! @Loonie is right Gantt is only available on the dashboard widget, not the board view at the moment. This is something we’re working on though—can definitely understand you want to see the subitems in the views as well. Here is the link to our subitems product plan so you can stay up to date!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.

posts.author: Benkazinik (Ben Kazinik)
posts.cookedHtml:
